stories.title: src/store/types.ts — StateStore interface + RenderRecord
acceptanceCriteria: RenderRecord type: status RenderStatus, progress number (0..1), error?, codec Codec, createdAt number, meta? Record<string,unknown>
StateStore interface: create(handle, initial): Promise<void>; get(handle): Promise<RenderRecord|null>; update(handle, patch: Partial<RenderRecord>): Promise<void>; delete(handle): Promise<void>
Imports RenderStatus/RenderHandle/Codec from core types (no redefinition), no @remotion/* import

stories.title: src/store/in-memory.ts — InMemoryStore() Map-backed factory
acceptanceCriteria: InMemoryStore(): StateStore backed by a Map keyed by raw handle string
create overwrites an existing handle without throwing (documented)
update on a missing handle throws RenderError('not_found', ...)
get on a missing handle resolves null (no throw); delete is idempotent (double-delete no throw)
All methods return resolved Promises (sync-in/async-out); no @remotion/* import

stories.title: Re-export from src/index.ts + tests + green build
acceptanceCriteria: src/index.ts re-exports InMemoryStore (value) and StateStore, RenderRecord (types)
test/in-memory.test.ts: full CRUD lifecycle, partial update preserves fields, missing-handle update throws not_found, idempotent delete, createdAt/meta round-trip
bun test exits 0 (all pass); bun run types (tsc --noEmit) 0 errors
bun run build exits 0; dist/index.d.ts contains no '@remotion' reference
Built dist re-exports InMemoryStore at runtime (importable)
